title: AdCP Specialism
description: Specialized capability claims an agent can make. Each specialism maps to a compliance storyboard bundle published at /compliance/{version}/specialisms/{id}/. An agent asserts specialisms it supports in get_adcp_capabilities; the AAO compliance runner executes the matching storyboards to verify the claim.

enumDescriptions.audience-sync: Syncs buyer-provided audience segments into a platform for activation
enumDescriptions.brand-rights: Brand identity and rights licensing (talent, music, stock media)
enumDescriptions.content-standards: Content standards enforcement (brand safety, policy compliance)
enumDescriptions.creative-ad-server: Creative ad server with tag-based delivery
enumDescriptions.creative-generative: Generative creative agent producing assets on demand
enumDescriptions.governance-delivery-monitor: Campaign delivery monitoring with drift detection
enumDescriptions.governance-spend-authority: Conditional spend approval and human-in-the-loop governance
enumDescriptions.inventory-lists: Property and collection list governance — curated inventory groupings for targeting and authorization
enumDescriptions.measurement-verification: Third-party measurement and verification across domains (viewability, brand safety, attribution, SI outcomes)
enumDescriptions.sales-broadcast-tv: Broadcast linear TV seller with guaranteed inventory and FCC cancellation rules
enumDescriptions.sales-exchange: Programmatic exchange or SSP exposing auction-based inventory
enumDescriptions.sales-guaranteed: Guaranteed media buys with human IO approval
enumDescriptions.sales-proposal-mode: Media buys negotiated via proposal acceptance
enumDescriptions.sales-retail-media: Retail media network seller with onsite, offsite, and in-store inventory
enumDescriptions.sales-social: Social media advertising platform with self-service flows
enumDescriptions.sales-streaming-tv: Connected TV and streaming seller with ad-supported video inventory
enumDescriptions.signal-marketplace: Marketplace signal agent reselling third-party data
enumDescriptions.signal-owned: Owned signal agent exposing first-party segments
